modules.comment: Set scale to Ionian/Mixolydian/Aeolian (modal). Each voice has its own notesequencer — edit them so vertical sonorities are consonant and motion is mostly stepwise / contrary
modules.name: transport

modules.comment: === SOPRANO ===  top voice, highest range — viol consort timbre via bowed-string
modules.name: soprano line

modules.comment: === ALTO ===  inner voice — fills the third/fifth above the tenor; avoid parallel fifths/octaves with soprano
modules.name: alto line

modules.comment: === TENOR ===  the structural cantus firmus voice — historically the slow-moving line others are composed against
modules.name: tenor line

modules.comment: === BASS ===  harmonic foundation — root motion drives the implied harmony beneath the polyphony
modules.name: bass line

modules.comment: === CONSORT VERB ===  small chamber resonance — keep wet level moderate so individual lines remain audible
modules.name: consort verb
